The film, released in **1969**, is a lesser-known gem of Dutch cinema and part of the "New Dutch Cinema" movement. It explores themes of greed and morality through a gripping narrative about a shipwreck and the passengers' descent into chaos. While it’s not as widely recognized as *Fight Club*, it holds a cult status in Dutch film history.
